arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres release clause bombshell shakes Arsenal and Chelsea
arts.sum: Surprising news regarding Viktor Gyokeres ’ release clause with Sporting CP could go a long way to dictating the January transfer window of both Arsenal and Chelsea . It claims that Gyokeres’ release fee will not be active during the January transfer window, meaning that Sporting will be free to demand whatever they want for the player.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hoping to exploit not so secret weapon fuelling title bid in Man City showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal have profited substantially from set pieces since the introduction of Nicolas Jover to Mikel Arteta's coaching staff, scoring 42 goals from set plays in that time

arts.ttl: Fulham's ex-Arsenal duo hand Newcastle first loss of the season
arts.sum: Fulham ended Newcastle United ’s unbeaten start to the Premier League season and recorded their second victory of the campaign, winning 3-1 at Craven Cottage thanks to two goals from their summer signings from Arsenal . Fulham have shown a lack of ruthlessness at times this season, but Smith Rowe managed to double their advantage in the first half to get that crucial second goal.

arts.ttl: Manchester United set for January battle with Arsenal for transformative young superstar
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly keen on bringing young Sunderland midfielder Chris Rigg to Old Trafford after impressing in the Championship. After a shaky start to their campaign which was topped off by a 3-0 home defeat to their bitter rivals Liverpool, the Red Devils produced a statement 7-0 win albeit against Barnsley in the EFL […] The post Manchester United set for January battle with Arsenal for transformative young superstar appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Foden decision, Gundogan role - Three ways Man City can lineup vs Arsenal without Kevin De Bruyne
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news with Pep Guardiola having several ways to replace Kevin De Bruyne for the clash against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Arsenal can unleash surprise Martin Odegaard alternative vs Man City with wildcard solution
arts.sum: Arteta, if he opts to leave Partey out of the starting XI, is far more likely to deploy either Havertz or Trossard in a central position but Sterling can be considered an option. The Gunners are guaranteed to be without both Mikel Merino and club captain Martin Odegaard for the trip to Etihad Stadium which will leave Arteta light for options in midfield.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Answers the Erling Haaland vs Kylian Mbappe Debate
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland are two of the best players in world football as things stand - but Rio Ferdinand believes one is better.
